commit.message:
feat(model-3d): add arc face splitting with edge snapping

- Add splitFaceByCurve kernel function that splits a face along a
  multi-segment curve path. First splits with a straight edge between
  boundary endpoints, then iteratively inserts intermediate vertices
  along the arc path via splitEdge + vertex repositioning.
- Add findPointOnBoundary helper to locate which face edge a point
  lies on, with tolerance for floating-point errors.
- Add edge snapping to ArcTool using existing snap infrastructure
  (generateAllSnapCandidates, snapPoint) for both start and end points.
- Replace D-shape ExtrudeGeometry with TubeGeometry for standalone
  arc creation — arcs are open curves, not enclosed shapes.
- Add targetFaceIndex to ArcTool DrawingState for HEMesh face lookup.
- Add 4 tests for splitFaceByCurve covering straight curves, multi-point
  arcs, boundary validation, and coplanarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): fix circle face splitting and revert arc face splitting

- Fix merge logic in splitPolygon to allow aggressive outer face merging
  for high-edge polygons (circles). Previous rule blocked ALL merges when
  both faces bordered the inner boundary; new rule only prevents merging
  when combined face would border ALL inner edges (frame topology).
- Normalize face normals after polygon split to prevent numerical drift
  in sliver face normals that breaks coplanar edge hiding.
- Revert ArcTool face splitting — arcs are open curves that should split
  like lines, not create enclosed D-shaped areas.
- Update test expectations for new merge behavior (2 outer faces for
  rectangles instead of 4).

commit.message:
fix(handoff): two root causes for endless questioning loop

Bug 1 — Stage 2 missing Hebrew meeting keywords:
  _meeting_keywords had "demo" (English) but never "דמו" (Hebrew). The bot
  always writes Hebrew, so "כן" after "האם תרצו דמו מותאם?" never matched
  Stage 2 → LLM classified "כן" as SALES → user stuck in question loop.
  Added "דמו", "הדמו", "שיחת" to the keyword set.

Bug 2 — Rule 8 forced a qualifying question in every B2B response:
  _build_final_rules had MANDATORY closing-question rule with no exit, so
  even after 10 messages the agent always repeated the same product pitch
  and asked another BANT question, ignoring all collected context.
  Added message_count param: when >= 5, rule 8 is replaced by a
  "Late Stage" close — confirm context, tell them a human will follow up,
  stop. Passes message_count from state in b2b_sales_agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Updated skill doc to reflect the simpler single-agent workflow.

Implements the full Spark dating app across multiple milestones:

- Monorepo setup with Turborepo, pnpm workspaces
- Design system: atomic UI components (packages/ui), Tailwind tokens
- Backend API: NestJS with 26 modules, Drizzle ORM, JWT auth, Socket.io
- Web app: Next.js 15 with App Router, onboarding flow, discover/swipe,
  chat/messaging, matches, profile, tables, video calls
- Marketing site: landing page with animated sections, legal pages
- Admin panel: Next.js dashboard scaffold
- Infrastructure: AWS CDK stacks (VPC, RDS, ElastiCache, S3, ECS Fargate)
- Shared packages: validators (Zod), types, i18n, ESLint/Prettier config
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions for lint, test, build, deploy

Fix form brush side ridges: Gaussian weight kernel, smooth depth interpolation

Replace linear cutoff weight (1-abs(d)*15) with Gaussian (exp(-d²*100))
for smooth_y gravity reference — eliminates hard transitions at capsule
segment boundaries. Also smooth depth across segments to prevent
per-form snapping in softness and light response. Widen gravity
smoothstep range (0.15→0.25) for more gradual onset.

commit.message:
Add incremental embedding: only embed new claims, append to existing

Detects new vs existing claims by comparing against claims_index.json.
Only embeds new claims and merges with existing embeddings array.
Handles removed claims (full rebuild), reordering, and no-change case.
Use --force to re-embed everything from scratch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: returning users in incognito/new browser no longer treated as first-time

In incognito or after clearing browser data, localStorage has no
myfin_onboarding_done flag. Previously this caused storageBootLoad to
skip cloud data pull entirely and show onboarding instead. Now we check
if the session has a family_id (indicating a returning user) before
falling into the first-time onboarding path.

feat: 주식 매수 신호 서버 초기 구현

한국 주식(KOSPI/KOSDAQ) 기술적 지표 기반 매수 신호를 텔레그램으로 발송하는
웹 기반 서버 전체 구현.

## Backend (FastAPI + SQLite + APScheduler)
- pykrx로 OHLCV 데이터 수집 및 DB 저장
- ta 라이브러리로 RSI, SMA, EMA, MACD, 볼린저밴드, 볼륨 지표 계산
- 전략 조건 평가 엔진: 그룹 내 OR / 그룹 간 AND·OR, crosses 연산자 지원
- 쿨다운 기반 중복 알림 방지 + python-telegram-bot 메시지 발송
- APScheduler로 전략 주기 실행 (서버 시작 시 자동 복구)
- 워크포워드 백테스팅: 수익률·MDD·샤프·승률 메트릭

## Frontend (Vanilla JS SPA, 다크 테마)
- 대시보드: 신호 피드(30초 폴링), 전략 상태, 통계 카드
- 주식 목록: 종목 추가/삭제, 데이터 다운로드, 활성 토글
- 전략 빌더: 조건 그룹 추가/삭제, 지표·연산자·임계값 UI
- 백테스트: 파라미터 입력, 메트릭 카드, 수익 곡선, 거래 내역
- 차트: TradingView Lightweight Charts 캔들 + RSI/MACD/BB 서브패널

## 배포
- start.sh (venv + uvicorn, port 8989)
- trading-signal.service (systemd 자동 재시작)
- .gitignore (.env, DB, 가상환경, 캐시 제외)

commit.message:
Fix Vercel build: Comfortaa font + conditional hooks (#21)

* Fix Chat AI: align questions with survey, upgrade model, fix mic errors

- Rewrote CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT to ask all 16 scorecard questions across
  Basic/Marketing/Sales/Delivery/Operations departments — matching the
  survey exactly so both paths produce comparable scores
- Upgraded lead-chat API from gpt-4o-mini → gpt-4o for stronger
  conversational reasoning
- Fixed mic/STT: wrapped recognition.start() in try/catch, added
  interimResults=false, and show inline error messages for denied
  permission, no-speech, and unsupported browsers instead of silent
  failures

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Replace Web Speech API with MediaRecorder + OpenAI Whisper for mic

Web Speech API silently fails on custom domains (no browser permission
prompt, no visible error). Replaced with:
- navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia() — triggers a real browser
  permission dialog the user can actually see and approve
- MediaRecorder to capture audio (webm/ogg)
- /api/transcribe endpoint that sends audio to OpenAI Whisper-1
- Button shows red pulsing while recording, gold spinner while
  transcribing, and clear inline error messages for denied permission
  or failed transcription

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Fix mic: remove stray conflict marker, detect blocked permission state

Shows actionable message with lock icon instructions when browser
has previously denied mic access rather than silently failing.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Fix mic: allow microphone in Permissions-Policy (was blocked site-wide)

Permissions-Policy: microphone=() was disabling getUserMedia for ALL origins
including self, which silently blocked the mic button before JS even ran.
Changed to microphone=(self) so the scorecard chat can use the mic.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Add LinkedIn Insight Tag and Microsoft Clarity placeholders

- LinkedIn partner ID 9703625 installed via afterInteractive Script
- Clarity scaffold ready — activate by setting CLARITY_ID

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Enable Microsoft Clarity (vsinfwt5xe)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Fix Vercel build: self-host Comfortaa font, fix conditional hooks

- Remove next/font/google (Comfortaa) — was failing to fetch at build time
  on Vercel, crashing every production deploy for the past 2+ hours
- Load Comfortaa via <link> CDN tag instead; set --font-comfortaa in CSS
- Fix scorecard-results/page.tsx: useState/useEffect were called after an
  early return, violating Rules of Hooks — moved them before the guard

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

---------

commit.message:
Fix email confirmation redirect to go through auth callback

The signup was using admin.createUser() which doesn't support redirectTo,
so confirmation emails redirected to the site root with a hash fragment.

Switch to admin.generateLink({ type: 'signup' }) which creates the user
AND returns an action_link with our custom redirectTo. We now send the
confirmation email ourselves via Resend with a branded template.

Flow: click link -> Supabase verifies token -> redirects to
/partners/api/auth/callback -> exchanges code for session -> dashboard

Also add emailConfirmationEmail template to the email templates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: build 4 consumer products — Kundli, Horoscope, Compatibility, AI Astrologer

Product 1 - Kundli/Birth Chart (/kundli): Full interactive birth chart with
North Indian diamond layout, planet cards with dignity/nakshatra, Yoga analysis
with BPHS citations, Dosha detection with remedies, Vimshottari Dasha timeline,
and Nakshatra personality profile. Tab-based navigation across 6 sections.

Product 2 - Daily Horoscope (/horoscope): Sign-based daily predictions with
Panchang widget, area-specific insights (love/career/health/spiritual), score
bars, lucky numbers/colors/times, daily mantra & remedy, planetary transit
influence. No auth required — works as standalone consumer product.

Product 3 - Compatibility Matching (/compatibility): Traditional Ashtakoot
8-point Guna Milan with circular score visualization, expandable Guna breakdown
bars, Mangal Dosha detection, Nakshatra matching, strengths/challenges analysis,
and Vedic remedies. Beautiful two-person form with heart connector.

Product 4 - AI Astrologer (/astrologer): Consumer-facing freemium AI chat with
quick-question cards, typing animation, rich markdown rendering, suggested
follow-ups, and 3-question free limit with upgrade CTA. No auth required.

Navigation: Updated Navbar with Products dropdown (desktop hover menu + mobile
section) linking all 4 products. Added "Ask AI" quick link.

3,049 lines of new code. TypeScript: 0 errors.
